title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #11, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You should enter since you're dirty.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: If you're afraid, you shouldn't have entered.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: But we'll get dirty again, anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: We won't move an inch from here!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: outside or inside; they're the same.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Haven't you looked around inside this mansion?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: When night comes, we'll run away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What'll we do, chopper? If that's true...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: usopp, chopper, did you say some- thing!?

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #11, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.
